title: Warm Spicy Vietnamese Fish Ca Kho To
description: A spicy and savory Vietnamese dish featuring fish cooked in a rich and gooey sauce, traditionally served as a hangover cure.

ingredients.name: fish pieces
ingredients.notes: firm white fish such as catfish or swai

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large clay pot or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook until fragrant.
Add the sliced bird eye chili and cook for 1 minute.
Add the fish pieces and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the marmite, fish sauce, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Deglaze the pot with a small amount of water, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the sauce for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the chopped scallions and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the fish and sauce hot over cauliflower rice or low-carb noodles.
